message.content: سلام! چطور می‌توانم کمکی برای شما کنم؟ 😊
message.reasoning: Okay, the user wrote "سلام", which means "Hello" in Persian. I should respond in a friendly manner. Let me make sure to acknowledge their greeting and offer assistance. Maybe say something like "سلام! چطور می‌توانم کمکی برای شما کنم؟" which translates to "Hello! How can I assist you?" That should be appropriate and welcoming.
